intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/2. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% through. This is your workout. Own it. 75% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/2. 30:00 at 87%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/2. 82-87% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/2. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 30:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 30:00 at 87%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 55%, 85-95 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/1. 45-55% FTP, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 10:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 2/2. 55% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 87% × 30:00. Then 10min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 30:00 at 87%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 87% for 30:00. Then 10min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 87% × 30:00. Seated, 85-90 rpm. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 80 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 88% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 88% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
